criteria.reason: Alembic migration created durable job and item tables and production is at revision 20260505_002.
Backend supports awaiting_confirmation and confirm-by-job-id start.
Manual review status is separate in scoring and UI filters.
Latest regeneration item is attached to services and rendered as quality history.
Telegram confirmation callback starts the same backend job.
429 path stores cooldown_until and new starts respect active cooldown.
Compile, tests, frontend build, migration, route checks, app logs, and Telegram status passed.

commands_run: python3 -m py_compile src/core/service_problem_regeneration.py src/core/service_keyword_scoring.py src/api/services_api.py src/telegram_bot.py alembic_migrations/versions/20260505_add_service_regeneration_jobs.py
production docker compose up -d --force-recreate app worker
